description: A scene at '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/lit_scene.hipnc' contains a teapot model with materials and lighting already configured. Set up multi-pass rendering using Mantra with at least these extra image planes: direct diffuse ('direct_diffuse'), indirect diffuse ('indirect_diffuse'), direct specular ('direct_specular'), and emission ('emission'). Configure the Mantra node to render each pass as a separate EXR file to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/passes/'. Then build a COP2 compositing network at /img that loads the rendered passes, combines them back together (diffuse + specular + emission), and writes the final composite to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/final_composite.exr'. Save the scene as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/multipass_composite.hipnc'.
